channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Top-level US-Iran peace talks to begin at Swiss resort with Hormuz in spotlight
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- U.S. and Iran to talk in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz again
- U.S. and Iranian Officials to Meet for Peace Talks in Switzerland
- U.S. and Iranian Officials to Meet for Peace Talks in Switzerland
- Iran says Switzerland talks with US focus on ending war, easing sanctions, releasing frozen assets
- US, Iran begin talks in Switzerland
- US-Iran negotiations in Switzerland kick off
- US and Iran to talk Sunday in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz again
- US-Iran talks in Switzerland to get under way as strait of Hormuz remains closed
- Middle East live: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it has closed strait of Hormuz
- US, Iran set for Switzerland talks as Tehran again claims closure of Strait of Hormuz
- Vance, Iranians in Switzerland for first talks, overshadowed by closure of Strait of Hormuz
- US-Iran peace talks set to start in Switzerland with Hormuz, Lebanon in spotlight
- US and Iran face make-or-break talks in Switzerland
- Vance in Switzerland for US-Iran talks as Strait of Hormuz closed again
- US-Iran talks set for today in Switzerland as Tehran claims Hormuz closure amid Lebanon conflict
- US disputes Iranian claims about closing Strait of Hormuz as negotiators head to Switzerland
- US disputes Iranian claims about closing Strait of Hormuz as negotiators head to Switzerland]]>

- Vance and Iranian Negotiators in Switzerland for Peace Talks
- The Latest: Vance and Iranian negotiators are in Switzerland to work on details of deal
- JD Vance in Switzerland for Iran talks
- US VP Vance arrives in Switzerland for Iran talks
- US Vice President JD Vance arrives in Switzerland to launch talks with Iran on its nuclear program
- US Vice President Vance arrives in Switzerland for nuclear talks with Iran
- Vance arrives in Switzerland for US-Iran talks
- Vance arrives in Switzerland for crunch US-Iran talks
- US VP Vance departs Washington for Iran talks in Switzerland
- U.S. Vice-President Vance arrives in Switzerland to launch talks with Iran on its nuclear programme
- Urgent: U.S. Vice President JD Vance arrives in Switzerland for talks with Iran -- media
- US Vice President Vance arrives in Switzerland for nuclear talks with Iran
- US VP Vance arrives in Switzerland for peace talks with Iran
- US Vice President JD Vance lands in Switzerland to launch talks with Iran on its nuclear program
- ‘Chicken and egg issue’: JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran talks, hopes for progress on Lebanon
- US VP JD Vance departs Washington for Iran deal talks in Switzerland
- US-Iran war news LIVE: JD Vance arrives in Switzerland to hold peace talks with Iran
- Iranian negotiators, Vance head to Switzerland amid Lebanon fighting]]>

- UK PM Keir Starmer faces leadership pressure as Labour tensions rise

- Starmer is on the precipice as pressure builds for the UK leader to resign

- Flash: Trump says "Iran must immediately stop their highly paid PROXIES in Lebanon from causing trouble" or will be hit "very hard again"

item.title: ‘Great progress’ made in talks with Iran, Vance says as talks kick off in Switzerland
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US-Iran war: JD Vance hails 'Great Progress' in talks, says Trump committed to regional Peace
- Vance says talks in Switzerland has yielded great progress]]>

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman among 10 killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza despite ceasefire
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Al Jazeera says Israeli strike kills journalist in Gaza
- Journalist among 11 killed in Israel’s assault on Gaza]]>

item.title: Turkiye, Egypt, Pakistan, Saudi Arabia welcome US-Iran MoU, reaffirm support for Palestinian statehood
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Egypt, Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Türkiye convene in Cairo to discuss U.S.-Iran MoU
- Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkiye, Egypt stress importance of swift conclusion to 'current phase' of US-Iran talks
- Egypt's president discusses U.S.-Iran MoU with Pakistani, Saudi, Turkish FMs
- Turkey, US, Egypt, Saudi Arabia hold Cairo talks on Iran, Libya, Gaza
- Turkey, US, Egypt, Saudi Arabia hold Cairo talks on Iran, Libya, Gaza]]>

Matched Titles:
- While the World Scrambles for Oil, China Sits on Full Tanks
